metadata.name: Handle Rental Car Coverage on a Claim

description: A customer's car is in the shop for a covered repair, and they need to arrange for a rental car under their policy.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their open claim, and verify they have rental reimbursement coverage.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster confirms the customer has rental coverage with a limit of $30/day.

nodes.task_description: Explain the coverage limits to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster clearly explains the daily limit and maximum number of days.

nodes.task_description: Set up a direct billing arrangement with a network rental car company.

expected_outcome.value: The adjuster makes a reservation for the customer and sets up direct billing.
